### Description of Changes
Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue (if any). List any dependencies that are required for this change.

Closes #[Issue Number]

### Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code style/refactoring (formatting, renaming, cleanup)

### Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have tested this change locally and verified there are no console errors
- [ ] The portfolio is still responsive on mobile devices
- [ ] The Three.js/WebGL canvas renders correctly with acceptable frame rates (FPS check)
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
